productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Purple Umbrellas
description: From a fashion accessory to an all-season necessity, the umbrella has come a long way. This compact umbrella from united colors of benetton has been crafted with absolute waterproof material and unique prints that give you a colourful edge in all seasons! Three-fold umbrella with eight ribs and stretchers made of stainless steel Shade and cover made of 100% polyamide for waterproofing and easy storageCap measures 100 cm in diameter when opened up Umbrella measures 24 cm in length when packedGreen shade and cover with purple and white heart and flower printSturdy stainless steel tube with a runner, top and bottom spring, and an open cap Green rounded plastic tip cup that has the Big Ben logoHaul loop for hanging ease CareWipe dust and dirt with a damp, clean clothHang dry in shade
